findings.evidence_regex: (season|季节|daily|日内|周|weekly|周期|cycl|pattern|模式)[^\n]{0,400}(decompose|分解|STL|detected|检测|identified|识别)
(point|spike|尖峰|outlier|离群|异常点)[^\n]{0,300}(10|sporadic|偶发|isolated|孤立|scatter|分散)
(level.*shift|水平.*偏移|systematic|系统性|step.*change|阶跃|突变)[^\n]{0,400}(day.*9[0-5]|第.*9[0-5].*天|12月.*2[9-30]|12.*下旬|recalibr|重新.*校准|校正)
(trend.*change|趋势.*变化|drift|漂移|aging|老化|deteriorat|劣化|slow.*increase|缓慢.*上升)[^\n]{0,400}(day.*12[0-9]|第.*12[0-9].*天|1月|January|after|之后)
(分类|categor|classif|类型|type)[^\n]{0,500}(spike.*shift.*drift|尖峰.*偏移.*漂移|point.*level.*trend|三种|3.*type|偶发.*系统)
